sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12665" key="a)poqusta/nion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποθυστάνιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n12665.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drinking-vessel,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0586.tlg001:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polem.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
